nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=110 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} enter {THRESHOLD} at {OPENING_MOMENT}; three dark openings breathe cool air and each throws back its own signal, {ROUTE_A_LURE}, {ROUTE_B_LURE}, and {ROUTE_C_LURE}; {HERO} must choose which signal to follow before {DEADLINE}'>>

choices.label: Follow the humming echo to the left.
Follow the dripping echo to the right.
Follow the whispering echo straight down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the first way, {ROUTE_A_CHAR}, draws them in as {ROUTE_A_LURE} steadies into a held note; {COMPANION} perks up; {HERO} edges toward a distant glow and a soft stirring ahead'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the way splits into two tracks: on one side {A1_SIGN} catches the light, on the other {A2_SIGN} deepens into a warm, pulling sound'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the track toward {A1_SIGN} runs past {A1_LANDMARK} that catches {HERO}'s light; the floor slopes gently down toward a narrow gap breathing cold air'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the slope opens into a small antechamber; {A1_ZONE_HINT} shows in the far wall and the air smells of clean wet stone, a sign the greater find lies just beyond'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the gap is just wide enough to pass, but {A1_GATE} blocks easy passage as {DEADLINE_SIGN} begins to gather at their feet; {HERO} can press through toward the reward or turn back toward {ENTRANCE} while the way stays safe'>>

choices.label: Turn back before the water rises.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} make their way back toward {ENTRANCE} as {DEADLINE_SIGN} rises around them; they reach the open air damp and safe, the greater find left for a better return, promising to come back at the next {OPENING_MOMENT}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='they slip through {A1_GATE} and come out the other side; {COMPANION} shakes off and the glow ahead brightens into {A1_ZONE}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='{A1_ZONE} opens around them, full of light and wonder; within reach sits {A1_OFFER1}, while a deeper way, {A1_OFFER2}, pulls onward toward something greater'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{HERO} carefully gathers {A1_OFFER1}; it is theirs to keep and lights a low passage that seems to curve back toward the way out'>>

choices.label: Follow the crystal's light back up.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='the find lights their way up and out to {ENTRANCE}; {HERO} steps into the open carrying {A1_PRIZE1} for real, with {COMPANION} close behind, proud of the safe treasure won'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the deeper way, {A1_OFFER2}, grows stronger; the passage widens and its walls smooth into {A1_PRIZE2_PATH}, shaped as if to carry sound'>>

choices.label: Follow the chord toward the sound.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='ahead the walls curve into {A1_PRIZE2_ZONE}; every drip and footstep rings and layers; {COMPANION} gives a wondering sound that echoes back many times over'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='{HERO} makes a single sound and the whole place answers in shimmering harmony; they have found {A1_PRIZE2}, a secret almost no one knew, and carry the wonder of it all the way home'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{A2_SIGN} leads down a rounded way; the sound is not wind but {A2_LANDMARK}, coming from far below; {COMPANION} pads ahead confidently'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the way steepens; {A2_LANDMARK} steadies into a slow, deep pulse, and pale light leaks up from a chamber below where {A2_ZONE_HINT} catches the glow'>>

choices.label: Climb down toward the chiming light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='{A2_GATE} offers a way down, left behind by someone long ago; {HERO}'s sense of {DEADLINE} says time is short; they can go down toward the reward or climb back up while they still safely can'>>

choices.label: Climb down the old rope ladder.
Scramble back up to be safe.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='{HERO} decides the find can wait for a safer day; they and {COMPANION} climb back up the rounded way and out to {ENTRANCE}, a little breathless but perfectly safe'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{A2_GATE} holds; at the bottom waits {A2_FIND}, old and weathered, still faintly sounding as slow drips strike it'>>

choices.label: Walk up to the great bell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='marks are set into {A2_FIND}, {A2_DETAIL1}; nearby a dry ledge holds useful leftovers from an earlier visitor'>>

choices.label: Read the name and look behind the bell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{HERO} records what {A2_DETAIL1} tells them; {A2_DETAIL2}, enough to help them climb back out the way they came'>>

choices.label: Take the lantern and rope and head out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='with what {A2_FIND} revealed kept safe and the old gear put to use, {HERO} and {COMPANION} climb back to daylight; everyone will want to hear about {A2_PRIZE}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the second way, {ROUTE_B_CHAR}, follows {ROUTE_B_LURE} deeper; {HERO}'s light shows a trickle running on into the dark and the air turns cold'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the trickle reaches a split: one way {B1_SIGN} grows louder, the other way {B2_SIGN} drifts from a low side-passage'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='following {B1_SIGN}, the floor turns to {B1_LANDMARK1} and the ceiling lifts away into a darkness {HERO}'s light cannot reach'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the way gives onto {B1_LANDMARK2}; the sound is only {COMPANION} testing the cold edge with one paw'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the shelf narrows into {B1_GATE}; below waits {B1_ZONE}; {HERO} can climb carefully down toward it or back off before anyone slips'>>

choices.label: Climb down to the lake shore.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='{B1_GATE} is too risky; {HERO} coaxes {COMPANION} back along the shelf and they retrace the way to {ENTRANCE}, arriving safe, the greater find left for braver footing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='they pick their way down to {B1_ZONE}; here at the edge of it, something waits for a bold explorer'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='two chances appear: nearby rests {B1_OFFER1}, and further along {B1_OFFER2} beckons with its own promise'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{B1_OFFER1} proves usable; {HERO} {B1_PRIZE1_PREP} until it is ready to carry them onward across {B1_ZONE}'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='{HERO} takes {COMPANION} across {B1_ZONE} to a far side where daylight leaks in; they climb out having done {B1_PRIZE1}, likely the first in a lifetime to manage it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{B1_OFFER2} lights up as {HERO} disturbs it, {B1_PRIZE2_PATH} leading toward a low, bright opening'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='the path leads to {B1_PRIZE2}, a hidden spot under open sky; {HERO} takes a small keepsake and makes their way back into daylight, sworn to keep the place secret'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the side-passage toward {B2_SIGN} is tight; {HERO} crouches under dripping ledges while {COMPANION} squeezes ahead toward {B2_LANDMARK1}'>>

choices.label: Crouch through toward the pale light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the way opens a little; {B2_LANDMARK2} runs along the floor toward a rounded chamber ahead'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the channel ends at {B2_GATE}; beyond it the light is bright, but {DEADLINE_SIGN} is filling the way behind them, so {HERO} must choose quickly to press on or hurry back'>>

choices.label: Hurry back before the channel fills.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='{HERO} will not risk {B2_GATE} closing behind them; they and {COMPANION} hurry back and reach {ENTRANCE} just as {DEADLINE_SIGN} pours in, hearts thumping, entirely safe'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='through {B2_GATE} the chamber opens into {B2_ZONE}, its water so clear it looks like air, alive with small creatures'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='{B2_ZONE} is a whole tiny world; in one corner {B2_OFFER1} stands out, and on the far side {B2_OFFER2} leads to a deeper, darker basin'>>

choices.label: Look closely at the orange starfish.
Follow the crab-track to the dark basin.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{B2_OFFER1} is a rare thing; {HERO} {B2_PRIZE1_ACT}, leaving it exactly where it belongs and recording the wonder of it'>>

choices.label: Finish the sketch and slip out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='{HERO} backs out with a full record of {B2_PRIZE1}; the experts will not believe it until they see the proof, and {HERO} and {COMPANION} climb out grinning'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{B2_OFFER2} leads to a darker basin where the water is deep; {B2_PRIZE2_FIND} gleams at the bottom, half-buried, catching the last of the light'>>
<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='{HERO} lifts out {B2_PRIZE2}, the finest thing they have ever found, and carries it up into daylight like a trophy, {COMPANION} celebrating alongside'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the third way, {ROUTE_C_CHAR}, is the darkest; {ROUTE_C_LURE} turns out to be only a draft over stone; {HERO} keeps one hand on the wall and {COMPANION} close as they go down'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the dark way forks: from one branch comes {C1_SIGN}, from the other {C2_SIGN}'>>

choices.label: Go toward the squeaking and flutter.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{C1_SIGN} grows busier; the ceiling lifts and {HERO}'s light catches {C1_LANDMARK} above; {COMPANION} presses close, uncertain'>>

choices.label: Creep on under the hanging shapes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='it is {C1_LANDMARK}, at rest in a great vaulted chamber; the air is warm and earthy, and {C1_ZONE_HINT} shows the way onward'>>

choices.label: Move quietly toward the grey light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='{C1_ZONE_HINT} may be a way up and out, but reaching it means {C1_GATE}; {HERO} can go carefully on toward the reward or back away and leave things undisturbed'>>

choices.label: Back away and leave the bats be.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='{HERO} will not risk disturbing what rests here; they and {COMPANION} ease back out and return along the dark way to {ENTRANCE}, dusty and awed and safe'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='they cross carefully; nothing stirs; beyond lies {C1_CLIMB1}, a rough way up toward the light far above'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{C1_CLIMB1} is steep but solid; partway up {HERO} finds {C1_CLIMB2}, proof that someone came this secret way long before'>>

choices.label: Climb on past the old carving.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the way narrows to {C1_CLIMB3}; light and fresh air pour down; {HERO} boosts {COMPANION} ahead and hauls up the last stretch'>>

choices.label: Push up through the mossy funnel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='they climb out through {C1_PRIZE}, high above {THRESHOLD}, blinking in the light; {HERO} has found a secret way in and out, and a discovery worth telling'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{C2_SIGN} grows nearer; {HERO}'s light finds {C2_LANDMARK1} wedged into a side-cave, weathered and old'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{C2_LANDMARK1} gives way with a groan; behind it {C2_LANDMARK2} has been made by hand, a hiding place with shapes stacked in the shadows'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='it is {C2_ZONE}, forgotten for a long time; but {DEADLINE_SIGN} already glistens on the floor, so {HERO} can step in for a quick look or leave it for a drier day'>>

choices.label: Step in for a quick look.
Leave the cache and beat the tide.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='{DEADLINE_SIGN} decides it; {HERO} marks the spot and hurries out with {COMPANION} ahead of the rising water, reaching {ENTRANCE} safe, the find saved for a better day'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='inside, {C2_INNER}; most have crumbled, but two smaller boxes sit dry on a stone shelf, their lids stiff but whole'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the first box holds {C2_OFFER1}; the second is heavy and rattles like {C2_OFFER2}; the water is creeping in, and {HERO} can only carry one out cleanly'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='{HERO} cleans {C2_OFFER1}; {C2_PRIZE1_ACT}, pointing the quickest way back toward {ENTRANCE} and the fading light'>>
<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='{C2_OFFER1} leads them straight out to {ENTRANCE} just as {DEADLINE_SIGN} returns; {HERO} carries {C2_PRIZE1}, and a story everyone will beg to hear'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the heavy box holds {C2_OFFER2}; {HERO} cannot count them now, but can carry the whole box out if they go at once'>>
<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='{HERO} hauls the box up to daylight just ahead of {DEADLINE_SIGN}; the experts will study {C2_PRIZE2} and put {HERO}'s name to the find'>>
